title: pseudolappula sinaica
side_effects: Pseudolappula sinaica can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain due to its toxic properties. Long-term exposure to the plant's extracts may also cause liver damage and kidney failure in severe cases. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can lead to skin irritation and dermatitis.
